visualizations.title: Conversion Formulas
visualizations.description: Formulas to convert between mixed numbers and improper fractions.

steps.explanation: Mixed to Improper: Multiply the whole number W by denominator d, add numerator n, and place over d.
Improper to Mixed: Find quotient W = n / d (integer division) and remainder r = n % d.

visualizations.title: 7/4 Equivalent to 1 3/4
visualizations.description: Watch how 7 quarters are counted individually as 7/4, then grouped together to form 1 whole and 3/4.
